creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Dmitry,
 
 On Sat, Sep 28, 2013 at 3:15 PM, Dmitry Marakasov <amdmi3@amdmi3.ru> wrote:
 > and as we don't follow redirects, this file won't fetch.
 
 I do not experience this problem, it works for me.  This was probably
 a transient problem.  Note that hackage.haskell.org sometimes have
 connection issues because it is operated by a smaller community and
 their server sometimes breaks down.  They have been also experimenting
 with moving the services to a new server [1], that might have also
 caused difficulties recently.
 
 Hence I would recommend to close this PR.
 
 [1] http://www.haskell.org/pipermail/haskell/2013-September/039159.html
